The '''''Steadfast''''' was a [[Carrier/Legends|fleet hauler]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and later the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. It participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and in the [[Siege of Coruscant|Battle of Coruscant]] against [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], and after the resolution of the [[Thrawn campaign]], was modified to become a "junker" under [[Operation Flotsam]], and transformed into a starship that searched the wrecks of starships for valuable material and data.

In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], it was dispatched to scour the hulk of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Gnisnal]]'' for valuable resources or information. The crew discovered an intact, fully operational datacore on Level Ninety-Six, in Corridor Q. The datacore's contents provided [[Asset Tracking]] office with its first, albeit aged, Imperial [[Order of Battle/Legends|Order of battle]], which allowed for the discovery of the [[Black Fleet]].

Because of the extreme value of its data, it was immediately sent back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to deliver the physical order of Battle datacore to [[Asset Tracking]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''
